title: helichrysum dichotomum
intro: Helichrysum dichotomum, also known as the yellow alant or alant, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Helichrysum dichotomum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, tinctures, and creams, which are applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
